code_snippets.create_temp_bins_weather_group:
# Create temperature bins for weather group analysis
df_train['temperature_bins'] = pd.cut(df_train['temperature'], bins=[-np.inf, 10, 15, 20, 25, np.inf], labels=['<10C', '10-15C', '15-20C', '20-25C', '>25C'])
code_snippets.calculate_weather_temp_group_mean:
# Calculate mean 'y' for each weather group and temperature bin
weather_temp_agg = df_train.groupby(['weather_group', 'temperature_bins'])['y'].mean().unstack()
code_snippets.create_kcal_bins_payday:
# Create kcal bins for payday interaction analysis using qcut for balanced distribution
df_train['kcal_bins'] = pd.qcut(df_train['kcal'], q=5, duplicates='drop', labels=[f'Kcal_Q{i+1}' for i in range(5)])
code_snippets.calculate_kcal_payday_group_mean:
# Calculate mean 'y' for each kcal bin and payday status
kcal_payday_agg = df_train.groupby(['kcal_bins', 'payday'])['y'].mean().unstack()
code_snippets.calculate_remarks_mean_y:
# Calculate average 'y' for each unique value in 'remarks' and sort
remarks_mean_y = df_train.groupby('remarks')['y'].mean().sort_values(ascending=False)
code_snippets.create_dayofweek_name:
# Ensure 'date' column is datetime and create 'dayofweek_name'
df_train['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df_train['date'])
df_train['dayofweek_name'] = df_train['date'].dt.day_name()
code_snippets.calculate_week_event_group_mean:
# Calculate mean 'y' for each combination of 'week' and 'event'
week_event_agg = df_train.groupby(['week', 'event'])['y'].mean().unstack()
code_snippets.create_precipitation_category:
# Create precipitation categories based on specified thresholds
bins = [-0.001, 0.001, 0.5, 1.0, 5.0, np.inf] # -0.001 to ensure 0 is in the first bin, 0.001 to separate trace from no rain
labels = ['No Rain', 'Trace (0-0.5mm)', 'Light (0.5-1.0mm)', 'Moderate (1.0-5.0mm)', 'Heavy (>5.0mm)']
df_train['precipitation_category'] = pd.cut(df_train['precipitation'], bins=bins, labels=labels, right=True)
code_snippets.calculate_precipitation_mean_y:
# Calculate average 'y' for each precipitation category
precipitation_mean_y = df_train.groupby('precipitation_category')['y'].mean()
code_snippets.y_outlier_analysis:
# Extract data rows with y outliers (y > 200 or y < 30)
y_outliers = df_train[(df_train['y'] > 200) | (df_train['y'] < 30)]
# Display relevant features for these outlier rows
if not y_outliers.empty:
    print("----- Y Outlier Analysis (y > 200 or y < 30) -----")
    print(y_outliers[['date', 'name', 'weather', 'temperature', 'event', 'remarks', 'y']].to_string(max_rows=20))
else:
    print("No y outliers found based on the criteria (y > 200 or y < 30).")

plot_snippets.weather_temp_heatmap:
# Plot heatmap of average y by Weather Group and Temperature Bins
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
sns.heatmap(weather_temp_agg, annot=True, fmt=".1f", cmap="viridis")
plt.title('Average y by Weather Group and Temperature Bins')
plt.xlabel('Temperature Bins')
plt.ylabel('Weather Group')
plt.show()
plot_snippets.kcal_payday_heatmap:
# Plot heatmap of average y by Kcal Bins and Payday
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
sns.heatmap(kcal_payday_agg, annot=True, fmt=".1f", cmap="YlGnBu")
plt.title('Average y by Kcal Bins and Payday')
plt.xlabel('Payday (0: No, 1: Yes)')
plt.ylabel('Kcal Bins')
plt.show()
plot_snippets.remarks_mean_y_plot:
# Plot bar chart of average y by Remarks
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
remarks_mean_y.plot(kind='bar')
plt.title('Average y by Remarks')
plt.xlabel('Remarks')
plt.ylabel('Average y')
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
plot_snippets.temp_y_loess_by_dayofweek:
# Plot LOESS for temperature vs y for each day of the week
lowess = sm.nonparametric.lowess
for day in df_train['dayofweek_name'].unique():
    subset = df_train[df_train['dayofweek_name'] == day].sort_values(by='temperature')
    if len(subset) > 1: # LOESS requires at least 2 points
        x = subset['temperature']
        y = subset['y']
        plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
        plt.scatter(x, y, alpha=0.3, label=f'{day} Data')
        smoothed = lowess(y, x, frac=0.4)
        plt.plot(smoothed[:, 0], smoothed[:, 1], color='red', label='LOESS Curve')
        plt.title(f'LOESS of y vs Temperature for {day}')
        plt.xlabel('Temperature')
        plt.ylabel('y')
        plt.legend()
        plt.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.6)
        plt.show()
    else:
        print(f"Not enough data points for LOESS plot for {day}")
plot_snippets.soldout_y_boxplot:
# Compare y distribution for soldout (1) vs non-soldout (0)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
sns.boxplot(data=df_train, x='soldout', y='y')
plt.title('Distribution of y by Soldout Status')
plt.xlabel('Soldout (0: No, 1: Yes)')
plt.ylabel('y (Sales)')
plt.show()
plot_snippets.week_event_heatmap:
# Plot heatmap of average y by Week and Event
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 8))
sns.heatmap(week_event_agg, annot=True, fmt=".1f", cmap="coolwarm")
plt.title('Average y by Week and Event')
plt.xlabel('Event')
plt.ylabel('Week')
plt.show()
plot_snippets.precipitation_bins_barplot:
# Plot bar chart of average y by Precipitation Category
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
precipitation_mean_y.plot(kind='bar', color='skyblue')
plt.title('Average y by Precipitation Category')
plt.xlabel('Precipitation Category')
plt.ylabel('Average y')
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
